description: Navigate to Claude.ai, send a prompt in a new conversation, and extract the response text.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Claude.ai uses a contenteditable div or ProseMirror editor for prompt input. The send button is typically a button element near the input area. Responses render in message containers with markdown formatting. The page uses a single-page app architecture with React.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use data-testid and aria attributes where available. Fall back to structural selectors (contenteditable div for input, message containers for output). Wait for response completion by detecting the stop of streaming.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Claude.ai requires authentication. Use saved session cookies. Typing simulation with human-like delays reduces detection risk. Rate limit to 1 prompt per 5 seconds minimum.
reasoning.performance: Expected run time: 30-120 seconds depending on response length (navigation 3s + typing 5s + response generation 20-100s + extraction 2s).

prompt.description: The prompt text to send to Claude.ai.
prompt.example: Explain the difference between TCP and UDP in 3 sentences.

wait_timeout_s.description: Maximum seconds to wait for Claude to finish responding. Default 120.

new_conversation.description: Whether to start a new conversation. Default true.

steps.description: Navigate to Claude.ai new conversation page
Verify Claude.ai authentication is active — if redirected to login, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Wait for the prompt input area to be ready
Type the prompt into the input area with human-like delays

steps.selector: button[aria-label='Send message'], button[data-testid='send-button'], button.send-button, form button[type='submit']
steps.description: Click the send button to submit the prompt
Wait for the response message container to appear
Wait for Claude to finish generating the response (no new content for 3 seconds)
Extract the full response text and HTML from the last message
Return the extracted response as structured data

response_text.description: Plain text content of Claude's response

response_html.description: HTML content of Claude's response (preserves formatting)

has_code_blocks.description: Whether the response contains code blocks

prompt_sent.description: The original prompt that was sent

error_handling.session_expired: Detect claude.ai/login redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED error
error_handling.rate_limited: Detect rate limit message — abort with RATE_LIMITED error and cooldown
error_handling.response_timeout: If response does not stabilize within wait_timeout_s, extract partial response and flag as PARTIAL
error_handling.empty_response: If no response container found after 30s, abort with NO_RESPONSE error
error_handling.selector_timeout: Retry once with 20s timeout, then abort
